cta.title: Open Source • Free Forever • For His Glory
cta.description: Join our community of faithful developers and worship leaders building technology to serve the Church worldwide

paragraphs: Open Worship is a free, open-source worship presentation software designed specifically for churches, worship teams, and religious organizations.

Our software provides all the tools you need to create engaging, professional worship experiences—from displaying song lyrics and Bible verses to managing your entire worship service from one intuitive interface.
Built by the community, for the community. Open Worship is developed by volunteers who understand the needs of modern worship services.
Best of all, Open Worship is completely free and open-source, meaning you can use it without any licensing fees and even contribute to its development.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Worship Experience?
cta.description: Join thousands of churches worldwide using Open Worship to create meaningful, engaging worship services.

googleTranslate.title: Google Translate Vigilant
googleTranslate.subtitle: Some text in Open Worship App is translated using Google Translate. Machine translation can miss nuances, so please verify important content before presenting it.

review.title: Review Accuracy
review.description: Double-check lyrics, scripture passages, and announcements that were auto-translated.

context.title: Context Matters
context.description: Idioms or local phrases may translate poorly. Adjust wording to match your congregation.

feedback.title: Invite Feedback
feedback.description: Encourage bilingual members to report mistakes so we can improve future translations.

report.title: Spot an incorrect translation?
report.description: Let us know about translation errors so we can provide better localized text in future releases.

aiVigilant.title: AI Vigilant
aiVigilant.subtitle: Results generated by AI should be reviewed carefully. Please verify lyrics, scriptures, or translations before projecting them.

review.title: Review & Confirm
review.description: Double-check lyrics, verses, and translations produced by AI before projecting them.

accountability.title: Maintain Accountability
accountability.description: Keep at least one human reviewer in the loop to approve AI-generated worship content.

protect.title: Protect Congregations
protect.description: Ensure theological accuracy so attendees receive faithful, trustworthy messages.

report.title: Need to report AI output?
report.description: If you encounter inaccurate or unsafe AI results inside Open Worship, please let us know so we can improve safeguards.

installation.title: Installation
installation.intro: Get Open Worship installed on your system with our easy-to-use installers.
downloadOptions: Windows: Download the .exe installer for automatic setup
macOS: Download the .dmg file for drag-and-drop installation
Linux: Download the .deb package or AppImage for portable use
installation.ctaSuffix: to get the latest version for your platform.

quickStart.title: Quick Start Guide
quickStart.intro: Follow these steps to start using Open Worship for your first worship service:

steps.heading: Launch the Application
steps.body: After installation, launch Open Worship from your applications menu or desktop shortcut.

steps.heading: Create Your First Worship Set
list: Click on “Song Management” in the main menu
Add songs to your library using the “Add Song” button
Create a new worship set and arrange your songs

steps.heading: Add Scripture Readings
list: Search for verses using the built-in search
Add selected verses to your worship set

steps.heading: Start Presentation Mode
list: Use arrow keys or mouse to navigate slides

systemRequirements.title: System Requirements
minimum: Operating System: Windows 10+, macOS 10.14+, or Linux (Ubuntu 18.04+)
dev: Git for version control (and Cygwin on Windows)

basicUsage.title: Basic Usage
basicUsage.intro: Learn the fundamentals of using Open Worship for your worship services.
basicUsage.mainInterfaceIntro: The Open Worship interface consists of several key areas:
areas: Editor: Create and edit slides, songs, and presentations
Presenter: Control live presentations during worship
Reader: View and manage your content library
Finder: Search across all your worship content

worshipSets.title: Creating Worship Sets
worshipSets.intro: Organize your worship content into cohesive sets for seamless services.
addingSongsSteps: Navigate to the Song Management section
Enter song title, lyrics, and metadata
